hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*/.env) echo 'BLOCKED: edits to .env files are not allowed; update .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qiE '(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token)[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*[A-Za-z0-9/_+-]{8,}'; then echo 'BLOCKED: possible secret in command.' >&2; exit 2; fi
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.py) ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;; esac
